test_name: November 2024 International Form B SAT Math Module 1
passage: Casey is raising h horses and g goats, Each horse requires 2 acres of land, and each goat requires 1 acre of land, The h horses and g goats require a total of 21 acres of land. Which equation represents this situation?

test_name: November 2024 International Form B SAT Math Module 1
passage: The function f (x) = $\frac{1}{9}$ （ x - 6) 2 + 3 gives a toy car's height above the ground f (x), in inches, x seconds after it started moving on an elevated track, where $0\le x\le10$. Which of the following is the best interpretation of the vertex of the graph of y = f (x) in the xy -plane?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The toy car's minimum height was 3 inches above the ground.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The toy car's minimum height was 6 inches above the ground.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The toy car's height was 3 inches above the ground when it started moving.

choices.label: D
choices.text: The toy car's height was 6 inches above the ground when it started moving.

passage: Two numbers have a product y, such that one number is x and the other number is 99 less than x. Which of the following equations represents the relationship between y and w?

test_name: November 2024 International Form B SAT Math Module 1
passage: A bank account was opened with an initial deposit. Over the next several months,regular deposits were made into this account, and there were no withdrawals made during this time. The graph of the function f shown, where y = f (x),estimates the account balance, in dollars, in this bank account a months since the initial deposit, To the nearest whole dollar, what is the amount of the initial deposit estimated by the graph?

test_name: November 2024 International Form B SAT Math Module 1
passage: The function F(m) = 7 m models the force, in newtons, acting on each object in a certain field as a function of the object's mass m, in kilograms. Which statement is the best interpretation of F (4) = 28 in this context?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The estimated force acting on an object with a mass of 4 kilograms is 28 newtons.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The estimated force acting on an object with a mass of 28 kilograms is 4 newtons.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The estimated force acting on an object with a mass of 7 kilograms is 4 newtons.

choices.label: D
choices.text: The estimated force acting on an object with a mass of 7 kilograms is 28 newtons.
